name: The Dun & Bradstreet Corporation
description: The Dun & Bradstreet Corporation is a leading global provider of business decisioning data and analytics. The company enables businesses around the world to improve their business performance through its Dun & Bradstreet Data Cloud and modern analytics solutions. These solutions provide insights that help customers accelerate revenue, mitigate risk, manage pipelines, and simplify compliance. Serving clients across various industries, Dun & Bradstreet delivers critical business information and commercial insights to support informed decision-making.
